mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_order (order_no, consultation_id, amount, status, pay_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{consultationId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{payTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(pay_time) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM payment_order WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(pay_time) ORDER BY DATE(pay_time)
